question:
Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) At least four women appear in the frame.
(2) All people on the right half of the frame are wearing blue clothes.
(3) There are only two people on the left half of the frame.
In this frame, please locate the man standing in the first row, wearing blue clothes and glasses.
What is the skin color of the man standing behind this man?

(1) When the lights hanging above the displayed car light up
(2) Locate the fourth car with its lights on
(3) If a person sits in the driver's seat of this car, from their first-person perspective, locate the car immediately to their right
(4) What brand is this car?

(1) Locate a man with pink hair and sunglasses
(2) Locate the moment he opens the door of a red house
(3) At this moment, he is very close to two other people, one of whom is not touching the door
(4) What is the gender of this person? What color is this person's hair?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) At least one person with pink hair can be seen in the frame
(2) At least one person wearing black clothes can be seen in the frame
(3) Two people wearing white clothes and holding cameras can be seen walking past behind the person in black clothes
How many women are there in the circle of people talking to the person in black clothes?

(1) Please locate a top-down view frame where people wearing blue clothes form a circle
(2) In the top-down view, there is a person wearing black clothes standing on the right side of the frame
(3) Please locate the floor pattern in the area where this person is standing, and remember the color of the text below this pattern
(4) What color was this text when it first appeared?

Locate a person that meets the following conditions:
(1) This person is wearing clothes with the word DIPLO printed on it
(2) This person is wearing red jeans
When this person stands in front of the car, locate the person who throws the ball in this round.
After this thrower throws the ball, what color does the circular light hanging above the car turn into?

(1) Locate the moment when the old man wearing the number 99 shirt is hit by the ball
(2) Locate the exact moment when the thrower of this ball throws it
(3) When they throw the ball, another person holding a ball can also be seen in the frame
(4) What is the number on this person's clothes?

(1) Locate a frame where a panoramic view of the disc can be seen, and everyone is assigned to five different areas according to age
(2) Locate the area where the group of people wearing pink clothes is located
(3) In the disc, there are two areas separated by one area from this area
(4) What is the age range of the older group among the people in these two areas?

(1) Locate the last remaining person in the 41-60 age group in the disc
(2) This person threw a ball before being hit
(3) Please infer which age group this ball was thrown towards?

(1) During the ball grabbing and throwing session, locate two people wearing green vests
(2) Locate the person among the two who is not wearing an action camera on their chest
(3) Is this person holding a ball when falling? If so, which hand is holding the ball?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) Everyone in the frame is wearing black clothes
(2) There are two blonde men wearing black clothes, one of whom is pointing towards the camera with his right hand
How many people wearing hats can be seen in the frame?

(1) Locate the moment when the five giant balls appear
(2) Suppose a person is facing these five giant balls and standing in the center of the field
(3) In what direction is the host holding the microphone from him?

(1) Locate a red-haired man wearing a yellow vest with his hands behind his head
(2) He appears on the left side of the frame
(3) In the same frame, a red-haired woman can also be seen in the distance
(4) Between the red-haired man and the red-haired woman, there is another woman
(5) What color is this woman's hair?

Locate a man that meets the following conditions:
(1) Wearing black clothes
(2) His left hand is resting on another man's shoulder
What color is the other man's hat?

Locate a woman that meets the following conditions:
(1) Short and stout figure
(2) Wearing a small headscarf
(3) At a certain moment in the shot, she is seen with her arms crossed
What is the number on the other man seen in the distance in this frame?

(1) When the countdown "0:21" can be clearly seen in the frame
(2) Observe the column where contestant No. 11 is located
(3) What is the number of the second person from the back in this column?

(1) When the countdown "0:12" can be clearly seen in the frame
(2) Locate the prize pool in the center of the frame
(3) From the camera's perspective, there is a contestant behind the prize pool
(4) From the first-person perspective of this contestant, assuming he stands facing the prize pool, what is the number of the contestant immediately to his right?

(1) Locate the moment when contestant No. 6 appears for the second time in the entire video
(2) In this frame, a woman can be seen with her back to the camera
(3) What number is on this woman's clothes?

(1) Locate the top-down frame after the countdown resets to "1:00"
(2) In this frame, the top grid of the rightmost column is a red light
(3) What is the clothes number of the contestant occupying the grid below the red light?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) A group of people can be seen in the distance of the frame
(2) Three people are standing in the foreground, the person on the far left is wearing a red top, and the person on the far right is wearing a gray top
(3) What color inflatable ball did the rugby ball thrown by the middle person break?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) A group of people can be seen in the distance of the frame
(2) Three people are standing in the foreground, Person A on the far left is wearing a red top, and Person B on the far right is wearing a gray top
(3) Locate a man in the crowd behind wearing the same top as A and the same hat as B
(4) What is the hair color of the man immediately to the left of this man?

(1) When there are only 97 pairs of twins left
(2) Locate the two blonde twin sisters appearing in the frame
(3) The twins in the cubicle behind and adjacent to them have the same hair color
(4) What color is this?

(1) When PIERCE appears in the frame
(2) Locate the two twin sisters talking to him
(3) In their cubicle, what is placed on the floor?

(1) Locate a blonde man wearing black clothes
(2) As he moves backward holding a tray filled with blue blocks, the blue blocks spill on the floor
(3) When the red cross appears in the frame, how many blue blocks can be seen scattered on the floor?

Locate a pair of twins that meets the following conditions:
(1) Both are wearing dreadlocks
(2) One of them dyed their hair yellow
(3) One of them is wearing a white top
How many pairs of twins were left uneliminated when they appeared in the frame?

(1) Please locate the TOBIN brothers
(2) Please locate another pair of twin brothers (referred to as the second pair of twins) in the adjacent cubicle to the TOBIN brothers (referred to as the first pair of twins)
(3) Between these two pairs of twins, which pair stacked 10 blocks faster? Which pair succeeded in the end?

(1) When the frame shows that only 59 pairs of twins are left
(2) A pair of twins can be seen failing the challenge, at which point the host in black clothes points at them with his hand
(3) What is the name on the back of this pair of twins' clothes?

Locate a person that meets the following conditions:
(1) Except for the host closest to the camera, all contestants are wearing blindfolds
(2) This person's clothes and pants consist of only two colors
(3) This person is not wearing a hat
What color is the outermost clothes of the person immediately to his right?

(1) In the YouTube Theater, locate the three winners
(2) Among the three winners, two are wearing hats
(3) What colors are these two hats respectively?

(1) Locate Man A wearing a gray hoodie with a wave pattern on the chest
(2) Among the two women beside this man, locate Woman B wearing clothes of the same color as his hat
(3) There is another Man C beside this woman
(4) What is the main color of Man C's clothes?

(1) Among the 15 people standing behind the answering podiums, locate the only person wearing a black hat
(2) Starting from this person, from his perspective, locate the person separated by 2 people from him
(3) When a number appeared above everyone's head, what was the number above this person's head?

(1) Locate the first person to catch a real person among the dummies
(2) This person has an action camera hanging on their chest
(3) What color is the strap hanging this camera?

(1) In the target throwing session, before the contestant wearing a black baseball cap backwards throws
(2) Locate the person second closest to the bullseye among all previous throwers
(3) What color is this person's hair?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) There is a staff member wearing a black hoodie on the left side of the frame
(2) There is a woman with long black hair on the right side of the frame
(3) One of the digits in the number on this woman's clothes is 5
What is the full number on this woman's clothes?

Locate a man that meets the following conditions:
(1) In the frame where he appears, there is another white-haired man in front of him
(2) In the frame, he is talking to a person outside the frame
(3) His hair color is black
What is the first digit of the number on this man's clothes?

(1) Locate a group of people sitting on the money pile
(2) When the camera films them from behind, the contestant on the far right of the frame is No. 177, and the contestant on the far left is No. 670
(3) In this frame, among the four people closest to the camera, locate the second person from the left
(4) What is this contestant's number?

(1) Locate a man with entirely white hair and beard appearing in the frame
(2) This man is wearing glasses
(3) Behind him, a person with pink hair can be seen
(4) What is the last digit of the number on this person's clothes?

Locate a woman that meets the following conditions:
(1) This woman is wearing a black headband
(2) The last digit of the number of the person behind this woman is 1
What is the first digit of the number of the person behind the person behind her?

(1) After the large screen displays "2:05"
(2) After two staff members in black clothes converse
(3) A contestant's blocks can be seen collapsing, and he is kneeling on the ground
(4) What is the last digit of this contestant's number?

(1) Please locate contestant No. 857
(2) Locate a frame where contestant No. 857 is standing on the right side
(3) There is a contestant kneeling behind contestant No. 857
(4) In the distance, the pole of the answering podium blocks the middle digit of a contestant's number
(5) What is the first digit of this contestant's number?

(1) Locate contestant No. 899
(2) When this contestant's blocks collapse
(3) How many contestants were given close-up shots of their shocked expressions by the camera?

(1) Locate the surveillance footage showing many computers
(2) In the frame, locate the row of computers closest to the camera
(3) In this row of computers, one computer shows a local close-up, and the picture is changing drastically
(4) Where is this computer located in this row?

(1) When the entire hall is enveloped in red ambient lighting
(2) Locate the moment the camera sweeps past contestants No. 377 and No. 378
(3) The prize pool can be seen in the background
(4) What is the number marked on the prize pool?

(1) When the host wearing a black T-shirt is holding a phone and talking
(2) It can be seen that there is an intersection behind him
(3) At this time, the red light happens to turn green, and the first row of cars is slowly passing through the intersection
(4) In the first row of cars, what color is the car closest to the host?

(1) Before the woman wearing a white camisole meets Txunamy at the corner
(2) While she is walking on the street, a black-haired woman walks past her
(3) What color is this woman's top?

(1) When the two boys wearing red T-shirts set off
(2) A couple wearing a yellow dress and a white T-shirt can be seen across the street ahead
(3) At this time, a car drives past in the middle of the road
(4) What color is this car?

(1) Locate the moment the girl in the white camisole and the girl in the black top appear for the second time
(2) When they are talking face to face, a door can be seen in the background
(3) On the wall next to the door, there are three devices located at the top left, top right, and bottom right respectively
(4) Where is the sign representing "accessible passage" located?

(1) When the woman in the black top is carrying the woman in the white camisole on her back
(2) A person riding a bicycle can be seen passing by on the road behind them
(3) What are the colors of this person's top and hat respectively?

(1) Locate the moment a man sprays colored ribbons on the stage
(2) There are only two men on the stage, please locate the other man
(3) What color is this man's top?

(1) Locate the "LOL PODCAST" stage, where 5 people are sitting
(2) Locate the person whose clothes change color
(3) From this person's first-person perspective, locate the person to the left of the person to their left
(4) What color is this person's top?

(1) When the two women complete the task for the first time ("CHALLENGE COMPLETED")
(2) Locate the moment the woman in the white T-shirt is walking on the road
(3) After she passes two black cars consecutively, a traffic sign on a pole by the road can be seen
(4) What sign is this?

(1) When the woman wearing a white camisole walks into the "DUBAI SAUCE" store
(2) Please locate the tray return area printed with "THANK YOU" in the store
(3) On the wall above the tray return area, the text "FOLLOW US ON" can be observed
(4) Which software does the rightmost of the three icons below the "FOLLOW US ON" text represent?

Locate a man that meets the following conditions:
(1) Wearing green clothes
(2) Wearing a blue hat
(3) Wearing sunglasses
When a man wearing red clothes approaches this man, what color is the piece of clothing closest to the man in red among the clothes sold by this man?

(1) Locate a man wearing a black jacket
(2) Locate the moment when there is a green sports car behind this man
(3) Suppose a person is sitting in the driver's seat of this sports car
(4) What color is the car closest to their front-left?

(1) Locate the man wearing a yellow reflective vest
(2) When he and another man are lifting a ladder together
(3) What color clothes is the man closest to him in the front wearing?

(1) Locate the moment when 10 people march past in a line, each holding a "red heart"
(2) On the wall next to the corridor, to the left of their marching route, three portraits can be seen
(3) Based on the portraits, which country does this building belong to?

(1) Locate a silver-gray sports car
(2) In a close-up shot, a man wearing black clothes is sitting on the right side of the front row of the sports car
(3) What color clothes is the person sitting to the left of this man wearing?

(1) Please locate a top-down view frame
(2) Several sports cars are lined up in the frame
(3) In the middle of the frame is a black building
(4) What color is the fifth sports car from the right?

(1) Locate the moment when 8 sports cars are lined up
(2) After this moment, in the same square, a frame showing three cameramen lined up can be seen
(3) Among these three cameramen, the middle one is bald, and the other two are wearing hats
(4) What color hat is the cameraman closest to the camera wearing?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) On the building in the middle of the 8 sports cars, 10 contestants are lined up
(2) On the large screen behind the contestants, a lightning logo can be seen
(3) There is English text on the large screens on both sides
What is written on the large screens on both sides?

Locate a man that meets the following conditions:
(1) He is wearing a camouflage hat
(2) He is holding an umbrella
(3) He is wearing a black top and pants
When he stands side by side with two other men, the middle man is also wearing a black jacket. What color is the top of the man on the far left of the frame?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) The background is a stage set with a black curtain
(2) Close to the camera, there are two chairs and six displays
(3) Three people appear in the frame
Among the six displays, which two are turned on?

(1) Locate a frame where a construction worker carrying a ladder enters transparent room No. 3
(2) Before this frame, locate the small square in front of the transparent rooms
(3) At the edge of the small square, there is a construction cordon, and construction workers are working inside the cordon
(4) How many construction workers are inside the cordon?

Please locate a vehicle that meets the following conditions:
(1) This is not a typical car
(2) The main color of the body is yellow
(3) The word "ZOOMLION" is printed on this vehicle
When this vehicle first appears, what color is the top of the man standing in front of it?

(1) Please locate transparent room No. 2, with the word "AUGUSTE" written above the door
(2) Suppose a person is standing outside the transparent room, directly facing the word "AUGUSTE"
(3) Locate the room immediately to their left hand direction
(4) What is the word on the door of this room?

(1) Locate a frame where the main subject is a display screen
(2) The display screen shows photos, names, and money amounts of the contestants
(3) Locate the contestant whose money amount is "$62420"
(4) What is the money amount of the contestant directly above this contestant?

(1) Locate contestant No. 152
(2) When this contestant and the host wearing black clothes appear in the frame at the same time
(3) Contestant No. 152 faces a pile of money with a total value of $500000
(4) What is the value of the pile of money behind the host?

(1) Please locate the moment the basketball hoop is set up
(2) After the basketball hoop is set up, please locate the third person who shoots the basketball into the hoop
(3) When this person shoots the basketball into the hoop, what color top is the person defending him wearing?

Locate a frame that meets the following conditions:
(1) This is a corridor scene
(2) There is a person wearing black clothes in the center of the frame
(3) A person is standing against the wall on the right side of the frame
(4) A total of 4 people appear in the frame
Among these 4 people, one person's top color is different from the others. What color is this person's top?

(1) Please locate the moment a black woman is putting makeup on the host wearing black clothes
(2) Around this moment, contestants wearing blue clothes can be seen lined up
(3) Please locate the contestant named MONIKA
(4) What is the sum of the number on this contestant's clothes and the number on the clothes of the contestant behind her?
